benchmark_note: Bounded deterministic spatial-VideoQA subset constructed from a YOLOv8-shaped synthetic detector pass. The SAME detector pass feeds all three caching strategies, so any cache-axis measurement is detection-parity clean. See BENCHMARK-REPORT for full disclosure.

queries_touched.note: No queries targeted this video in the subset; recording direct cache-write/read timing separately.
No queries targeted this video in the subset; recording direct cache-write/read timing separately.

verdict_justification: Primary defend: zpe_latency (2193.966 ms) <= parquet_latency (2173.123 ms) * 1.5 AND zpe_cross_writer_stable=True AND parquet_cross_writer_stable=False AND answer-accuracy within 2pp (delta=0.00pp).
sovereign_gate_note: This plan does not claim primitive-native Compass-8 closure regardless of verdict. The sovereign Compass-8 primitive-native gate remains RED. A defend verdict opens a scaling follow-up; it does not close the substrate gate.

uncertainty_markers.llm_sampling_variance: Greedy decoding on CPU; N=3 determinism spot check produced match rate 1.000.
uncertainty_markers.gpu_vs_cpu_latency: Mac CPU only; latency not comparable to GPU runs.
uncertainty_markers.parquet_writer_variance: pyarrow vs fastparquet compared at default settings; variation expected and recorded.
uncertainty_markers.zpe_writer_variance: Repo encoder vs independent reference re-implementation from the format spec; expected to match if spec is deterministic.
uncertainty_markers.benchmark_subset_bias: Synthetic deterministic VideoQA spatial subset (not LongVideoBench/MLVU pixels); subset is designed to test the boxes-as-text-token cache hypothesis, which is the wedge thesis.

detector_parity_note: All three strategies receive identical detector output from the deterministic YOLOv8-shaped per-video pass. Detection-level fairness is enforced by construction.
